title: Applied History — lab for using historical case study to inform contemporary policy
public_claim: An applied-history lab for using historical cases as disciplined analytic instruments.
distinctive_mechanism: It connects portfolio-native case selection, Belfer-style applied-history logic, Hoover-style historical working-group discipline, analogy limits, institutional context, decision points, and present-use constraints so historical comparison can become a bounded case-study memo rather than loose analogy.
use_value: It matters because history is useful only when the transfer conditions, institutional differences, decision points, and analogy limits are explicit.
